

---
title: "Umah Chukwudi Williams"
sortby: "1"
subtitle: "Doctoral Researcher"
image: williams.jpeg
started: "Jul 2025"
toc: false
about:
  id: person-profile
  template: jolla
 
---
 
```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
<ol class="breadcrumb">
<li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
<li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../people.html">People</a></li>
<li class="breadcrumb-item active">PhD Students</li>
<li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">{{< meta title >}}</li>
</ol>
</nav>
```
 
:::{#person-profile}
:::
 
## Research Interests
computational imaging & microscopy, tomography, ptychography
 
## Brief Bio
 
Williams earned his MSc in Artificial Intelligence at Friedrich-Alexander-Universität Erlangen-Nürnberg in September 2025. His background spans computer vision, deep learning, reinforcement learning, and computational visual perception.
 
## Experience
